allow: Bash(ssh mad@100.107.220.5 "ls /dev/ttyUSB* /dev/ttyACM* 2>/dev/null && python3 -c ''import mpremote'' 2>&1 || echo ''mpremote not found''")
Bash(ssh mad@100.107.220.5 "ls /dev/ttyUSB0 /dev/ttyACM0 2>/dev/null; which mpremote; python3 -m mpremote connect list")
Bash(ssh mad@100.107.220.5 "pip install mpremote -q && mpremote connect /dev/ttyUSB0 exec ''print\(1+1\)''")
Bash(ssh mad@100.107.220.5 "~/.local/bin/mpremote reset && sleep 10 && timeout 8 ~/.local/bin/mpremote connect /dev/ttyUSB0 repl 2>&1 | head -40 || true")
Bash(ssh -t mad@100.107.220.5 "~/.local/bin/mpremote reset && sleep 12 && stty -F /dev/ttyUSB0 115200 raw && timeout 10 cat /dev/ttyUSB0")

Bash(ssh mad@100.107.220.5 "bash -lc ''mpremote connect /dev/ttyUSB0 exec ""import state, config; print\(state.manual_mode, state.manual_relays\); from actuators import ActuatorManager; from machine import I2C, Pin; i2c = I2C\(config.I2C_ID, sda=Pin\(config.I2C_SDA\), scl=Pin\(config.I2C_SCL\), freq=config.I2C_FREQ\); print\([hex\(a\) for a in i2c.scan\(\)]\)""''")
Bash(ssh mad@100.107.220.5 "bash -lc ''mpremote connect /dev/ttyUSB0 exec ""import state; print\(\\""manual_mode:\\"", state.manual_mode\); print\(\\""relays:\\"", state.manual_relays\)""''")
Bash(ssh mad@100.107.220.5 "bash -lc ''mpremote connect /dev/ttyUSB0 exec ""import state; print\(state.manual_mode, state.relay_states\)""''")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\)\); print\(''''manual_mode:'''', d[''''manual_mode'''']\); print\(''''relays.C2:'''', d[''''relays''''][''''C2'''']\); print\(''''c2_on:'''', d[''''c2_on'''']\); print\(''''manual_relays.C2:'''', d[''''manual_relays''''][''''C2'''']\)")
